title: PowerView / PowerSploit Domain Reconnaissance
description: Detects PowerView domain reconnaissance cmdlets used to enumerate users, groups, ACLs, trusts, and delegation across Active Directory. Heavily used in GOAD walkthroughs prior to privilege escalation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Get-DomainUser*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-DomainComputer*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-DomainGroup*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-NetUser*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-NetComputer*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ObjectAcl*' or 'Command Line' like '*Find-InterestingDomainAcl*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-DomainTrust*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-ACLScanner*')))
